summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new bakery shop admin features including archive/unarchive orders, delete orders, stats tracking, and UI integration. All backend APIs working correctly and frontend UI properly integrated.
passed_tests: Get orders with archived filter GET /api/orders?archived=false
Get orders with archived filter GET /api/orders?archived=true
Stats endpoint GET /api/orders/stats with current_week, previous_week, all_time data
Stats structure validation (revenue, orders, completed, cancelled counts)
Archive/unarchive workflow - order moves between active and archived lists
Admin Orders tab toggle between Active and Archived orders
Orders grouped by date display with calendar icons
Archive button present on active orders
Restore and Delete buttons present on archived orders
Admin Stats tab with This Week, Previous Week, All Time cards
Stats cards show revenue, total orders, completed, pending/cancelled counts
Daily breakdown sections for current and previous weeks
Stats update correctly when orders are cancelled or deleted

success_percentage.backend: 100% (25/25 API tests passed including new archive/stats functionality)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components working, archive toggle, stats display, date grouping)
